About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker Dashboard Today's data shows ATEX commanding the momentum landscape with a dominant rank #1 score of 94.6, driven by extraordinary returns across all timeframes—notably a 65.55% one-month gain and 398.18% six-month return that far exceed broad market benchmarks (67.24% vs SPY over one month). The ticker demonstrates textbook consistency with all four SMA gates passing and a clean momentum signal of 1.84, though the extremely high ratio_1w_1d of 7.2 indicates the 1-day surge (5.11%) represents an outlier spike rather than sustained acceleration. MRNA follows in the rankings with more moderate but still robust performance—a 57.4% one-month return and 162.78% yearly gain—but shows a structural weakness with ratio_3m_1m dropping to 0.74, suggesting three-month momentum may be decelerating relative to near-term gains. Both leaders maintain strong positioning above key moving averages and show positive performance on down-SPY days, indicating resilience, though ATEX's concentration of gains in specific windows warrants scrutiny about sustainability.
